function mergeProps(slotProps, childProps) {
    const overrideProps = {
        ...childProps

    for(const propName in childProps){
        const slotPropValue = slotProps[propName];

            overrideProps[propName] = {
                ...slotPropValue,
                ...childPropValue
            };
        } else if (propName === "className") {
            overrideProps[propName] = [
                slotPropValue,
                childPropValue
            ].filter(Boolean).join(" ");
        }
    }
    return {
        ...slotProps,
        ...overrideProps
